title: Chewy Jammy Russian Black Olives Tagine
description: This quick-fix Russian dish is perfect for a weeknight meal or as a side to your favorite macrobiotic-friendly entrees. The combination of black olives, garlic, and spices creates a rich and savory flavor profile.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a large clay tagine or Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for another minute, stirring constantly.
Add the cumin, coriander, paprika, and turmeric, and stir to combine.
Add the pitted black olives and stir to coat with the spice mixture.
Add 1/4 cup of water and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and cook, covered, for 10-12 minutes, or until the olives are tender and the sauce has thickened.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired
